phase_name: Gantt phantom space between header and bars — fix in progress, overcorrected

completed_tasks.name: Bug 2 fix: Enter-only commit for __new__ row (no blur path)
Frappe v1.2.2 parent bar guard + stale focus timer cancellation
initGanttDragLink called from setGanttZoom after SVG rebuild
Overlay height formula fix attempt — OVERCORRECTED, broke left-pane alignment
completed_tasks.progress: Applied but wrong: overlay at 94px, left pane header still at 85px — misaligned

remaining_tasks.name: Fix phantom space WITHOUT misaligning left pane — see blocking constraint below
Browser UAT: verify gap gone AND left pane header aligns with Gantt header on all 3 zoom modes

blockers.description: Commit 8cb60f3 overcorrected — overlay height changed to 94px but left pane .tg-header CSS is still 85px, causing visible misalignment (left pane header shorter than Gantt header)
blockers.workaround: Either: (A) also update .tg-header height to 94px in views.css, OR (B) find approach that covers the 9px gap without growing the overlay div (e.g. SVG rect at y=85-94, or set Frappe padding=0 so bars start at header_height)

human_actions_pending.action: Browser UAT after fix: check Day/Week/Month zoom — no gap, left pane header aligns with Gantt header

decisions.decision: Root cause of phantom space is confirmed: #ganttHeaderOverlay height (85px) < Frappe bar start y (header_height + padding/2 = 94px). The 9px gap shows SVG grid background.
decisions.rationale: Verified by reading Frappe v1.2.2 source: config.header_height = 85, padding default = 18, bar y = header_height + padding/2 = 94.

decisions.decision: views.css has uncommitted change: border-bottom added to #ganttHeaderOverlay. May or may not be needed depending on final fix approach.
decisions.rationale: Added by debug agent alongside height fix — evaluate whether to keep or revert.

next_action: Fix the phantom space + left pane alignment together. The simplest correct fix: update BOTH the overlay height (project-plan.js renderCustomGanttHeader, line 1635) AND the .tg-header CSS height (views.css) to the same computed value (94px), so left pane and Gantt header are the same height. Then commit both files together.
context_notes: The phantom space was a 9px gap between the white overlay div (covering SVG date headers, height=85px) and the first bar row (Frappe places bars at y=94px). We've been chasing this as a line/element bug but it's a coverage gap. Previous fix (8cb60f3) correctly identified the formula but only fixed the Gantt side — left pane CSS was not updated to match.
